scope.postureChecks: Read-only Linux host checks for vulnerable kernel posture, risky module state, and known supply-chain persistence paths.
scope.notInScope: No exploit testing, malware execution, automatic cleanup, token revocation, or claims that a host is clean.
scope.fragnesia: CVE-2026-46300 affects supported AlmaLinux releases through esp4, esp6, and in some AlmaLinux 9/10 cases rxrpc. Built-in patched kernel thresholds follow AlmaLinux's May 13, 2026 disclosure.
